name: Enchilada Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Crumble the ground beef in a 2 quart glass dish.
2. Microwave on high for 5 minutes, stirring occasionally. Drain excess fat using a plastic colander.
3. Stir into the meat mixture the onion, garlic powder, chili powder, cumin, tomato sauce, and water.
4. Reduce microwave power to 70% and cook for 5 minutes.
5. In a 2 quart round casserole dish, alternate layers of tortilla, meat sauce, and cheese. Make sure the last layer is covered with cheese.
6. Cover the dish and microwave at 70% power until the casserole is bubbly hot and the cheese is melted (about 5 minutes).
